scope: wave2 fan-out migration: the 5 legacy-parity read streams only (shops, products, orders, blueprints, print_providers). Printify's mutating product/order endpoints (create/update/delete product, submit/cancel order) are out of scope; legacy itself ships no writes (capabilities.write is false).

excluded.reason: legacy connector never implemented product creation; Pass B capability expansion
legacy connector never implemented order submission; Pass B capability expansion
order cancellation is a destructive mutation legacy never implemented; Pass B capability expansion
blueprint-scoped print provider listing not modeled by legacy; Pass B capability expansion
